steps: Go to https://app.smartlook.com and log in or create an account
Click your account avatar in the top-right corner
Select the project you want to generate an API token for
Scroll to the 'REST API' section on the right side
Enter a label for the token and click 'Save'
Copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again after you close the dialog
Use the token with the EU API endpoint https://api.eu.smartlook.cloud

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Smartlook REST API token. Sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: This is the EU-region API endpoint for Smartlook — use this if your project data is stored in the EU
Tokens are scoped per project — create separate tokens for each project
Token is shown only once upon creation — save it immediately
Tokens expire automatically after 90 days of inactivity
Multiple tokens can be created per project for different purposes
Free plan available with limited session recordings

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve information about the current project
